notes: Live capture recorded for `productChangeStatus`, including Shopify's one-second updatedAt skew between the mutation payload and immediate downstream product read. The staged runtime intentionally serializes the effective downstream-aligned product for both surfaces, so this scenario compares mutation data and immediate downstream status-filter reads with only that captured timestamp skew path-scoped.

expectedDifferences.reason: The live capture shows Shopify returning an earlier updatedAt in the mutation payload than the immediate downstream product read; the proxy intentionally returns the downstream-aligned effective product timestamp from the staged overlay model.
The proxy and Shopify agree on the downstream product updatedAt instant after status change, but serialize the UTC timestamp with different fractional-second precision.
